verifyEmail.subject: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.heading: Hi {{firstName}},
verifyEmail.body: Please verify your email address to activate your account. This link expires in 24 hours.
verifyEmail.safety: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password
passwordReset.heading: Hi {{firstName}},
passwordReset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new one. This link expires in 1 hour.
passwordReset.safety: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password won't change.

welcomeEmail.subject: Welcome to First Backend!
welcomeEmail.heading: Welcome, {{firstName}}!
welcomeEmail.body: Your account has been verified and is now fully active. You're all set to get started.
